data.name: LangWBC: Language-directed Humanoid Whole-Body Control via End-to-end Learning
로봇이 로봇을 훈련시킨다: 휴머노이드를 위한 자동 실제 세계 정책 적응 및 학습
다단계 강화학습을 통한 휴머노이드 전신 배드민턴

data.description: LangWBC: Language-directed Humanoid Whole-Body Control via End-to-end Learning mentions Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
LangWBC: Language-directed Humanoid Whole-Body Control via End-to-end Learning cites or references Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids.
LangWBC: Language-directed Humanoid Whole-Body Control via End-to-end Learning cites or references Humanoid Whole-Body Badminton via Multi-Stage Reinforcement Learning.
